chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-679 of 2019 M/s. Sufiyan Steel & others Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecutions. Dated: 28.09.2021 None present. -.-.- This petition seeks release of the consignment in terms of declared value as required in terms of section 25 of Customs Act, 1969. After filling of this petition counsel for petitioners remained absent on 18.02.2019 and so also today. There is no intimation either. The petition as such is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application. Judge Judge
